title: BL-21 Competency CaCl2 Treatment
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c2nv4","text":"Protocol for Calcium Chloride treatment to induce competency in BL-21 cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"b9606","text":"Due to working in non-selective media, ensure to follow sterile protocol at all steps.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"38alv","text":"PER COLONY -","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ertv","text":"55 1.5mL sterile microcentrifuge tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ptvr","text":"5mL of sterile 100mM CaCl2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5br5q","text":"2mL of sterile 100mM CaCl2 + Glycerol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"946rk","text":"1 plate of non-selective media (LB Agar or TSA)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1qh9i","text":"60mL of sterile LB (10mL in a falcon, 50mL in a 250mL shaking flask)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5podo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"el1ba","text":"Microcentrifuge with temperature control (pre-chilled to 0ºC)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6tj69","text":"Cold room is helpful","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"22r7o","text":"Ice Water bath","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Plate your BL-21 on non-selective plates (LB Agar or TSA)
Incubate overnight at 37 °C
Using a sterile pipette tip, pick a colony and add to 10mL of non-selective LB
Incubate overnight at 140 rpm, 37 °C, 12 hours
Add 500 µL of overnight culture to 50 mL of non-selective LB
Incubate 210 rpm, 37 °C, 2 hours
Measure OD600 every 00:30:00 until early to mid-log phase (0.35-0.55)
Take colony and add to wet ice to halt growth.
Gather 5 prechilled 1.5mL tubes
Add 1mL of culture to each tube
Gather 55 sterile 1.5mL tubes and add to freezer to chill
Consider labeling the tubes at this point to save time later
You can also label tubes now.
Everything from this point forward needs to be as close to 0ºC as possible.
Centrifuge the tubes at 8000 rpm, 0 °C, 5 minutes
Discard supernatant
Repeat steps 11-13 9 times until a total of 10mL worth of cells is added to each tube
Resuspend each tube in 1mL of 100 millimolar (mM) CaCl2 by pipetting
Incubate on ice for 02:30:00
Centrifuge the tubes at 8000 rpm, 0 °C, 5 minutes
Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 500mL of 100 millimolar (mM) CaCl2 + 15 % volume glycerol
Aliquot 50 µL into pre-chilled tubes.
Last time pipetting up and down is possible, from here on out mix by flicking
creator: mpalacios
